km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Ashton VI於1255年出生在英國時，他的父親Richard Ashton V20歲，母親Joan de Cliffee21歲。他和Rose Throssell至少有1個兒子。他去世於1343年在他的家鄉享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Ashton VI于1255年出生在英国时，他的父亲Richard Ashton V20岁，母亲Joan de Cliffee21岁。他和Rose Throssell至少有1个儿子。他去世于1343年在他的家乡享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Ashton VI was born in 1255, in England, his father, Richard Ashton V, was 20 and his mother, Joan de Cliffee, was 21. He had at least 1 son with Rose Throssell. He died in 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Ashton VI est né en 1255, à Angleterre, son père, Richard Ashton V, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan de Cliffee, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Rose Throssell. Il est décédé en 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Ashton VI 1255 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Ashton V 20 und seine Mutter Joan de Cliffee 21. Er hatte mit Rose Throssell mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 88 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Ashton VI è nato il nel 1255 nel England, il suo padre, Richard Ashton V, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Cliffee, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Rose Throssell. Morì nel 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton VIが1255年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Richard Ashton Vは20歳，母Joan de Cliffeeは21歳であった。彼はRose Throssellとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1343年に故郷で88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Ashton VI(이)가 1255년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Ashton V(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Cliffee(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Rose Throssell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1343년 그의 고향에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Ashton VI nasceu em 1255, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Ashton V, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Cliffee, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Rose Throssell. Ele faleceu em 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Ashton VI родился в 1255 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Ashton V было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Cliffee, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Rose Throssell. Он умер в 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Ashton VI nació en 1255, en Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Ashton V, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan de Cliffee, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Rose Throssell. Murió en 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 88 años.

th.1235–Female: ปี1235–ถึงแก่กรรม
